name: Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 16 oz black beans, cooked, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Sauté onion, garlic, green pepper and jalapeno in oil until soft. Add spices and herbs; cook a few minutes longer. Add tomatoes, corn, salsa and beans and simmer several minutes. Add salt to taste. Prepare topping by sifting together flour, cornmeal, baking powder, salt, mustard powder and sugar. Combine milk and egg. Stir into cornmeal just until moistened; fold in corn. Pour bean mixture into (8x8) baking dish, top with cornbread, and bake 25-30 minutes.
Topping variation: Increase cornmeal to 1 cup and omit flour, baking powder, sugar, milk, corn and egg. Boil 3 cups water and stir in cornmeal, mustard, 1/2 tsp salt and 1 tbsp lemon juice. Bring to boil, then simmer, stirring, 4-5 minutes until thickened.
